BTP - (Fleet) - Asset Strategy Analysis for Classes App - Flow 1 (Create, Edit, Operating Context & Summary Report Download) - Functional Test
should create a new assessment with all mandatory fields
should edit the assessment description and save
should edit the Planning Data and Organizational Data sections and save
should add roles, assign the user, then unassign one role
should open the Assessment section and click Create Operating Context and Condition
should add characteristics, set their values, create the OCC and use Baseline
should open the Summary Report and confirm the dialog
should delete the edited assessment and verify it is removed
BTP - (Fleet) - Asset Strategy Analysis for Classes App - Flow 2 (Create & Delete)
should create a new assessment with all mandatory fields
should open the Assessment section and click Create Operating Context and Condition
should add characteristics (incl. FLUID_CR), set their values, and create the OCC
should click the "+" Add button on the newly created Operating Context and select "Assign Maintainable Items"
should select a maintainable item row and click Assign
should expand the newly created Operating Context row in the Assessment Hierarchy
should click the "+" Add button on the assigned maintainable item row
should select "Assign Failure Modes", search, tick the matching row and click Assign
should click the edit button on TestOCC1 and rename the Operating Context
should delete the assessment and verify it is removed
BTP - (Fleet) - Asset Strategy Analysis for Classes App - Flow 3 (Create & Delete without Baseline)
should create a new assessment with all mandatory fields (without baseline)
should open the Assessment section and click Create Operating Context and Condition
should add characteristics (incl. FLUID_CR), set their values, and create the OCC
should click the "+" Add button on the newly created Operating Context and select "Assign Maintainable Items"
should select a maintainable item row and click Assign
should expand the newly created Operating Context row in the Assessment Hierarchy
should click the "+" Add button on the assigned maintainable item row
should select "Assign Failure Modes", search, tick the matching row and click Assign
should expand the Inspection Ports row to reveal the assigned failure mode
should click on the assigned failure mode (False alarms)
should click "Assign" on the Failure Effect section, tick "Slow Down" and confirm
should click "Assign" on the Failure Mechanism section, tick "Loose Hub" and "Corrosion/Erosion" and confirm
should expand the Failure Mechanism section, tick "Loose Hub", click Remove and confirm
should click "Assign" on the Causes section, tick "Misaligned" and "EROSION" and confirm
should expand the Causes section, tick "EROSION", click Remove and confirm
should expand the Strategies section
should click "Create" on the Strategies section, fill the form and submit
should tick the created strategy, click "Edit & Update", change the description, save and confirm
should click on the Operating Context (TestOCC1)
should click "Assign/Unassign Technical Object" → Assign → Equipment
should tick the first equipment, click Confirm, OK, then close the column
should delete the assessment and verify it is removed
